title: Burninator
body:
Basically this is a little tweak mod that lets you make blocks "hot" like magma blocks using a tag. I'm not sure anyone actually needs this but i'll upload it here anyways!

Documentation is on [ye olde github](https://github.com/quat1024/burninator).

Questions? Comments? Just lonely? Join me on Discord: https://quat1024.github.io/discord/
